title: Re-Cursor
body:
# Re-Cursor | Reimagine the Cursor
**Re-Cursor** is a Minecraft client-side mod that replaces the default system cursor with a stylish, pixel-art design that blends perfectly with the game’s aesthetic.

🌈 **Adaptive Cursor** -> The cursor changes
depending on in-game context. When typing/searching or holding items the cursor adapts to reflect your actions. The Adaptive Cursor also dynamically scales on startup to fit your GUI scale settings.

🎨 **Fully Resource-Pack Configurable** -> Easily swap out cursor styles using resource packs. No need to modify code. A resource pack template has also been provided [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/re-cursor-template). (Please note that to update the cursor you need to restart the game)

⚡️ **Lightweight & Cross-Compatible** -> Next to no performace impact. Also works with not only **Windows** but also **Mac** and **Linux**! Re-Cursor is also completely client-side meaning you can use it wherever you want.

> ### ✅ Modpack usage policy 
> All of MMTs (Monolith Modding Team) mods are allowed to be distributed in modpacks, but please do not re-distribute re-cursor to other sites or port/fork it without our consent.

> ## Upcomming Features (1.3)
> 1. Better Holding Cursor Hotspot
> 1. Re-adding Dynamic Scaling Toast for 1.21.1+
> 1. Cursor Diacritics
> 1. Fix for Configurable Cursor Hotspots
